title: HELP!!! Urine sample sent to the lab
selftext: Took a preemployment drug screening today. I’m prescribed adderall for ADHD. I disclosed this at the appointment. I’ve been nervous about my THC as I quit over a month ago (worked in a legal state, now I won’t be working in a legal state). 1st image is right before the test and I’ve gotten this faint (but there) line on like 5 tests before this one. Went in fairly confident. Took the urine test and they said they’d have to send it out to the lab due to being an “inconclusive test”. Second picture is as soon as I got home afterwards. Will I test positive for THC? Is it just going to the lab to confirm my adderall? Also, I don’t always take all of my prescribed dose due to not wanting to be up all night (my provider is aware of this), will that hurt me in the end? Ex. Prescribed 20mg but only take 10mg HELP!!! 😭
